message:
Expand verification harness: add OpenAI, Azure, and Cohere smoke tests

Extend tests/provider_native_verify.rs with 3 new provider smoke modules:
- openai_smoke: 6 tests (text, unicode, tool call, 3 error codes)
- azure_smoke: 6 tests (Azure-specific api-key auth, deployment URL)
- cohere_smoke: 6 tests (Cohere-native tagged SSE events: message-start,
  content-delta, tool-call-start, message-end)

Total: 131 passing tests across 7 providers (Vertex, Bedrock, Copilot,
GitLab, OpenAI, Azure, Cohere). VCR cassettes for all scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+{
+  "version": "1.0",
+  "test_name": "verify_azure_error_auth_401",
+  "recorded_at": "2026-02-10T17:36:16.044Z",
+  "interactions": [
+    {
+      "request": {
+        "method": "POST",
+        "url": "https://test-resource.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/gpt-4o-mini/chat/completions?api-version=2024-02-15-preview",
+        "headers": [
+          [
+            "api-key",
+            "[REDACTED]"
+          ],
+          [
+            "Content-Type",
+            "application/json"
+          ]
+        ]
+      },
+      "response": {
+        "status": 401,
+        "headers": [
+          [
+            "Content-Type",
+            "application/json"
+          ]
+        ],
+        "body_chunks": [
+          "{\"error\":{\"code\":\"invalid_api_key\",\"message\":\"Simulated error 401\",\"param\":null,\"type\":\"invalid_request_error\"}}"
+        ]
+      }
+    }
+  ]
+}
